item.title: Ethereum Eyes $2.8K: Bitmine's 61K ETH Buy Fuels Abra's $750M SPAC Surge
item.description: Ethereum surges 8.8% eyeing $2.8K as Bitmine scoops 61K ETH amid global unrest. Abra's $750M SPAC deal shakes crypto wealth management—implications for you and market.
